name: elsa-diagrams-monorepo
description: Build/deploy orchestration for the elsa-to-mermaid library + web brochure. deploy → netlify (apps/web), release → tarballs into the central _releases/ feed.

scripts.build:lib: npm run pin:wasm && cd packages/elsa-to-mermaid && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.build:web: npm run build:lib && cd apps/web && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.release: npm run build:lib && mkdir -p ../../../_releases/npm && npm pack ./packages/elsa-to-mermaid --pack-destination ../../../_releases/npm && npm pack ./packages/elsa-to-mermaid-cli --pack-destination ../../../_releases/npm
